title: 月末挤水分析
description: 分析月末订单集中度，识别月末冲量和虚假繁荣风险

kpis.label: 最后3天订单量
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER) >= 29
kpis.help: 本月最后3天（29-31日）创建的订单总量

kpis.label: 占月总订单比
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29 THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(order_qty_mt),0),1) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603'
kpis.help: 最后3天订单量占本月总订单量的比例

kpis.label: 未发货订单占比
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29
kpis.help: 最后3天订单中零交货的比例

kpis.label: 异常分公司数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as v FROM (SELECT order_brnch_descrptn FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' GROUP BY order_brnch_descrptn HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29 THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(order_qty_mt),0) > 30)
kpis.help: 最后3天订单占比超过30%的分公司数量

stages.title: 日维度订单节奏
stages.description: 本月每日订单量分布，观察月末集中度
stages.sql: SELECT strftime('%d', order_crt_date) as 日期, ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as 订单量_吨, COUNT(*) as 订单数 FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' GROUP BY strftime('%d', order_crt_date) ORDER BY 日期
stages.insight_focus: 订单量是否均匀分布？月末是否出现明显峰值？

stages.title: 分公司末尾集中度
stages.description: 各分公司最后3天订单占比排名
stages.sql: SELECT order_brnch_descrptn as 分公司, ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as 月总订单量_吨, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29 THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 末3天订单量_吨, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29 THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(order_qty_mt),0),1) as 末3天占比_pct FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' GROUP BY order_brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 末3天占比_pct DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司月末集中度最高？是否存在冲量嫌疑？

stages.title: 打款发货匹配
stages.description: 最后3天订单的交货状态分布
stages.sql: SELECT order_brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(*) as 末3天订单数, COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='C' THEN 1 END) as 已完成交货, COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='B' THEN 1 END) as 部分交货, COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN 1 END) as 零交货, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) as 零交货率_pct FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER)>=29 GROUP BY order_brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 零交货率_pct DESC
stages.insight_focus: 月末订单的实际交货率如何？零交货率高的分公司是否存在虚假下单？

summary_prompt: 根据以上月末挤水分析数据（日维度节奏、分公司集中度、打款发货匹配），请以销售管理视角总结：1)月末冲量是否严重，2)哪些分公司嫌疑最大，3)建议的管控措施。不超过150字。
